name: Safety Net
flavor: There's always a net under the wire. Tonight, it's you.
description: You call a quiet promise to an ally: no fall is final tonight. Choose one ally you can see within range. It gains [[1d6]] temporary hit points, and until the start of your next turn it has advantage on saving throws against being frightened or charmed.
sheetSummary: Bonus action, 30 ft, cooldown 2. Chosen ally gains [[1d6]] temporary hit points and advantage on saves vs frightened/charmed until the start of your next turn.
